title: Ordering at The Gilded Spoon
opening: Good evening! Welcome to The Gilded Spoon. Have you had a chance to peruse our menu, or are you ready to order straight away?

t1.prompt: Good evening! Welcome to The Gilded Spoon. Have you had a chance to peruse our menu, or are you ready to order straight away?
t1.promptTranslation: Good evening! Welcome to The Gilded Spoon. Have you had a chance to peruse our menu, or are you ready to order straight away?

t2.prompt: Excellent. What takes your fancy this evening? Our pan-seared scallops with saffron risotto and the slow-cooked lamb shank are consistently popular, or tonight's special is a wild mushroom and truffle pasta.
t2.promptTranslation: Excellent. What takes your fancy this evening? Our pan-seared scallops with saffron risotto and the slow-cooked lamb shank are consistently popular, or tonight's special is a wild mushroom and truffle pasta.

t3-dietary.prompt: Absolutely. We're well-equipped to handle most dietary requirements. Are we discussing gluten-free, dairy-free, vegetarian, or do you have any specific allergies we should be mindful of? We can adapt the truffle pasta or offer a grilled halloumi salad.
t3-dietary.promptTranslation: Absolutely. We're well-equipped to handle most dietary requirements. Are we discussing gluten-free, dairy-free, vegetarian, or do you have any specific allergies we should be mindful of? We can adapt the truffle pasta or offer a grilled halloumi salad.

t3.prompt: A splendid choice! And for drinks or any appetizers to start?
t3.promptTranslation: A splendid choice! And for drinks or any appetizers to start?

t4.prompt: Coming right up. Will that be all for now, or is there anything else I can fetch for you before your meal arrives?
t4.promptTranslation: Coming right up. Will that be all for now, or is there anything else I can fetch for you before your meal arrives?

t-repeat.prompt: I do apologise, I seem to have missed that. Would you mind repeating or rephrasing your request?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: I do apologise, I seem to have missed that. Would you mind repeating or rephrasing your request?

t-end.prompt: Here's your bill. Please take your time with it. When you're ready, I'll be back to settle up. Thank you for dining with us tonight; we hope to have the pleasure of serving you again soon!
t-end.promptTranslation: Here's your bill. Please take your time with it. When you're ready, I'll be back to settle up. Thank you for dining with us tonight; we hope to have the pleasure of serving you again soon!
